The order of students in the queue doesn't actually matter for the final count. Think about why.
What matters is the total count of sandwiches of each type vs the number of students who prefer each type.
Count how many students prefer type 0 and type 1, then count how many sandwiches of each type exist.
Students who can't eat = MAX(0, students_wanting_type_X - sandwiches_of_type_X) for each type X.
